ādeśin (wie eben)
1〉 adj. anweisend, gebietend: tatra hūṇāvarodhānām — kapolapāṭalādeśi (den Wangen Blässe anweisend) babhūva raghuceṣṭitam  RAGH. 4,68 .
— 2〉 m. Astrolog  H. 482 . Vgl. ādeśa 3.

results.rendered_html:
ādeśin a.
1 Ordering, commanding.
2 Causing, producing.
3 Exciting, instigating; kapolapāṭalādeśi babhūva raghuceṣṭitaṃ  R. 4. 68. 
— m.
1 A commander, director.
2 An astrologer, fortune-teller.
